summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeLife v2 quote creation platform. All core features working correctly including real-time BigInt calculations, section management, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with TradeLife branding and Create Quote link
Create Quote page loads with default empty section
Trade type dropdown has all options (General, Electrical, Plumbing, etc.)
Direct Labour / Subcontract toggle works correctly
Direct Labour mode shows Labour Days and Day Rate inputs
Subcontract mode shows Subcontract Cost input
Materials and Margin inputs functional with BigInt storage
Real-time calculations: 5 days × £250 + £500 materials + 25% margin = £1,750 cost, £2,187.50 revenue, £437.50 profit, £2,625 gross
Quote Summary panel shows correct aggregated totals with 20% VAT
Add Section button creates new section cards
Remove section button works (only shown when >1 section)
Multiple sections aggregate correctly (tested with 3 days × £200 = £864 total)
Mobile responsive design with bottom bar showing total gross amount
MoneyInput and PercentageInput components handle pence/percentage conversion correctly
All data-testid attributes implemented for robust testing
